name: oh-my-copilot
description: Production-grade agentic framework for GitHub Copilot CLI. 14 specialized agents (Atlas, Sisyphus, Hephaestus, Oracle, Prometheus, Metis, Momus, Explore, Librarian, Multimodal-Looker, Ultrawork, NLM-Researcher, Personal-Advisor, Sisyphus-Junior) with TDD-verified safety hooks and NotebookLM research integration.

changelog.2.0.0: Initial production release with 14 agents, 21 skills, bats TDD framework
